name: @mojir/dvala-playground-builder
description: Playground site assembler — bundles the static site (book + reference + examples) around the playground-www bundle.
//: Asymmetric build: plain tsgo (no rolldown). Bundling is done by the per-package rolldown.bundle.config.mjs invoked via the `bundle` Turbo task. See .github/AGENTS.md > Build conventions.
